mapper.insert:
select board_bno_seq.nextval from dual
insert into board (bno, btitle, bcontent, bdate, bwriter, bhintcount, battachoname, battachsname, battachtype, battachdata) values (#{bno}, #{btitle}, #{bcontent}, #{bdate}, #{bwriter}, #{bhintcount}, #{battachoname}, #{battachsname}, #{battachtype}, #{battachdata})
mapper.update:
update board
btitle = #{btitle}, bcontent = #{bcontent}, bdate = #{bdate}, bwriter = #{bwriter}, bhintcount = #{bhintcount},
battachoname = #{battachoname}, battachsname = #{battachsname}, battachtype = #{battachtype}, battachdata = #{battachdata},
where bno = #{bno}
